text.title: shadcn-ui-architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for shadcn-ui-architecture as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Re-running `npx shadcn@latest add button` to "upgrade" overwrites local edits silently.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: shadcn has no automatic upgrade path; running `add` again replaces your local modifications. Always diff after `add`.

failure-mode.description: Wrapping `<Slot>` children in extra divs when using `asChild`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Radix `asChild` requires exactly one React child. Extra wrapper divs break slot semantics and lose focus management.
